name: 크롬을 열고 www.sooplive.co.kr로 접근해서 라이브 중인 방
nl_command: 크롬을 열고 www.sooplive.co.kr로 접근해서 라이브 중인 방송 몇개 타이틀을 읽어와줘.
code:
def run():
    open_app("Google Chrome")
    wait_until("the browser is ready and address bar is visible", capture_screenshot)
    
    click_on("address bar")
    hotkey("command", "a")  # macOS
    type_text("www.sooplive.co.kr")
    press("enter")
    
    wait_until("the Soop Live homepage is loaded and live broadcast thumbnails are visible", capture_screenshot)
    
    screenshot_path = capture_screenshot()
    titles = read_text_from_screen(screenshot_path, "all visible live broadcast titles on the page")
    
    print(titles)

run()
